---
name: create-instructions
agent: Instructions Generator
---
Take the information below and generate an agent intructions .md file for it in the /docs directory. If a .md filename is provided, use that, otherwise generate a appropiate filename based on the generated content. Make sure the instructions are concise and not too long. Make sure to update the AGENTS.md file to reference this new docs file. If no information is not provided below, prompt the user to give the necessary details about the layer of architecture or coding standards to document.
